spell_Apparate.name: Apparate
spell_Apparate.effect: A non-verbal transportation spell that allows a witch or wizard to instantly travel on the spot and appear at another location (disapparate is the opposite)

spell_Avada Kedavra.name: Avada Kedavra
spell_Avada Kedavra.effect: Also known as The Killing Curse, the most evil spell in the Wizarding World; one of three Unforgivable Curses; Harry Potter is the only known witch or wizard to survive it

spell_Avis.name: Avis
spell_Avis.effect: Conjures a small flock of birds

spell_Bat.name: Bat
spell_Bat.effect: Bogey Hex - Turns the target's boogers into bats

spell_Capacious Extremis.name: Capacious Extremis
spell_Capacious Extremis.effect: Known as the Extension Charm, it's a complicated spell that can greatly expand or extend the capacity of an object or space without affecting it externally

spell_Confundo.name: Confundo
spell_Confundo.effect: Known as the Confundus Charm, it causes confusion of the target

spell_Conjunctivitis Curse.name: Conjunctivitis Curse
spell_Conjunctivitis Curse.effect: Affects the eyes and sight of a target

spell_Crucio.name: Crucio
spell_Crucio.effect: One of three Unforgivable Curses, it causes unbearable pain in the target

spell_Diffindo.name: Diffindo
spell_Diffindo.effect: Used to precisely cut an object

spell_Disillusionment Charm.name: Disillusionment Charm
spell_Disillusionment Charm.effect: Causes the target to take on the appearance of its surroundings

spell_Disapparate.name: Disapparate
spell_Disapparate.effect: A non-verbal transportation spell that allows a witch or wizard to instantly travel on the spot and leave for another location (apparate is the opposite)

spell_Engorgio.name: Engorgio
spell_Engorgio.effect: Causes rapid growth in the targeted object

spell_Expecto patronum.name: Expecto patronum
spell_Expecto patronum.effect: The Patronus Charm is a powerful projection of hope and happiness that drives away Dementors; a corpeal Patronus takes the the respective animal form of the caster, while a non-corpeal appears as a wisp of light; at 13, Harry Potter was the youngest known witch or wizard to prouduce a corpeal Patronus

spell_Erecto.name: Erecto
spell_Erecto.effect: Allows a witch or wizard to build a structure, like a tent

spell_Expelliarmus.name: Expelliarmus
spell_Expelliarmus.effect: Forces an opponent to drop whatever's in their possession

spell_Ferula.name: Ferula
spell_Ferula.effect: A healing charm that conjures wraps and bandages for wounds

spell_Fidelius Charm.name: Fidelius Charm
spell_Fidelius Charm.effect: A complex charm that conceals a secret into the soul of a chosen "Secret Keeper". If a location is the subject of concealment, it becomes undetectable to others

spell_Finite Incantatem.name: Finite Incantatem
spell_Finite Incantatem.effect: A general counter-spell that's used to reverse or counter already cast charms

spell_Furnunculus Curse.name: Furnunculus Curse
spell_Furnunculus Curse.effect: A jinx that causes a breakout of boils or pimples

spell_Glisseo.name: Glisseo
spell_Glisseo.effect: Transforms a staircase into a slide

spell_Homenum Revelio.name: Homenum Revelio
spell_Homenum Revelio.effect: Reveals the presence of another person

spell_Homonculus Charm.name: Homonculus Charm
spell_Homonculus Charm.effect: Detects anyone's true identity and location on a piece of parchment; used to create the Marauder's Map

spell_Impedimenta.name: Impedimenta
spell_Impedimenta.effect: A temporary jinx that slows the movement of the target

spell_Imperio.name: Imperio
spell_Imperio.effect: One of the three Unforgivable Curses, it places the target under the complete control of the caster

spell_Langlock.name: Langlock
spell_Langlock.effect: Causes the target's tongue to stick to the roof of their mouth

spell_Levicorpus.name: Levicorpus
spell_Levicorpus.effect: Levitates the target by their ankle

spell_Locomotor Mortis.name: Locomotor Mortis
spell_Locomotor Mortis.effect: The Leg-Locker curse bounds the target's legs

spell_Morsmordre.name: Morsmordre
spell_Morsmordre.effect: Conjures and projects Lord Voldemort's Dark Mark

spell_Mucus Ad Nauseam.name: Mucus Ad Nauseam
spell_Mucus Ad Nauseam.effect: Inflicts an extreme runny nose or cold

spell_Muffliato.name: Muffliato
spell_Muffliato.effect: Creates a buzzing sound in the target's ears to prevent eavesdropping

spell_Nox.name: Nox
spell_Nox.effect: Reverses the lumos charm, extinguishing a wand's light

spell_Oppugno.name: Oppugno
spell_Oppugno.effect: Directs an object or person to attack a victim

spell_Petrificus Totalus.name: Petrificus Totalus
spell_Petrificus Totalus.effect: Temporarily freezes or petrifies the body of the target

spell_Piertotum Locomotor.name: Piertotum Locomotor
spell_Piertotum Locomotor.effect: Incantation used to bring to life inanimate objects and artifacts

spell_Protean Charm.name: Protean Charm
spell_Protean Charm.effect: Links objects together for better communication

spell_Protego.name: Protego
spell_Protego.effect: Casts an invisible shield around the caster, protecting against spells and objects (except for The Killing Curse)

spell_Reducio.name: Reducio
spell_Reducio.effect: Shrinks an enlarged object to its regular size

spell_Reparifors.name: Reparifors
spell_Reparifors.effect: Heals magical ailments like poisoning or paralysis

spell_Rictusempra.name: Rictusempra
spell_Rictusempra.effect: A charm that disarms an opponent by tickling them

spell_Riddikulus.name: Riddikulus
spell_Riddikulus.effect: Used to defeat a Boggart, the charm allows the scary creature to assume a comedic form, disarming it

spell_Sectumsempra.name: Sectumsempra
spell_Sectumsempra.effect: Inflicts severe lacerations and haemorrhaging on the target

spell_Sonorus.name: Sonorus
spell_Sonorus.effect: Amplifies the witch or wizard's voice

spell_Stupefy.name: Stupefy
spell_Stupefy.effect: The Stunning spell freezes objects and renders living targets unconscious

spell_Tarantallegra.name: Tarantallegra
spell_Tarantallegra.effect: Aimed at the legs, causes uncontrollable dancing movement

spell_Unbreakable Vow.name: Unbreakable Vow
spell_Unbreakable Vow.effect: A magically binding contract that results in the death of whoever breaks it

spell_Wingardium Leviosa.name: Wingardium Leviosa
spell_Wingardium Leviosa.effect: Causes an object to levitate; but remember what Hermione said: "It's Wing-gar-dium Levi-o-sa, make the 'gar' nice and long.'"
